title: Kyiv Just Survived Its Worst Night in Months
script: Kyiv's Worst Night In Months? For eleven straight hours, Russia hit Ukraine's capital with almost 500 drones and more than 70 missiles — nearly half of them ballistic. At least 21 people were killed. In the Darnytskyi district, a nine-story apartment building partially collapsed with residents still inside, and a second building nearby was blown apart from the first floor to the sixth. Around 130 buildings across the city took damage in a single night. Officials are calling it one of the largest strikes of the entire war — the deadliest attack on the capital since May, when a similar strike brought down another apartment block and killed 24. Rescue crews are still digging through the wreckage for survivors. So how many more worst nights does one city get?
